message:
feat(agent): multi-source message fetchers, queue bounds, and error persistence

Agent loop enhancements:
- Shift from single-source to multi-source message fetchers: steering_fetcher
  and follow_up_fetcher are now Vec-based (steering_fetchers/follow_up_fetchers)
  with additive register_message_fetchers() API, allowing RPC + extensions to
  both queue steering messages into the agent loop.
- build_context() now filters out hidden custom messages (Message::Custom with
  display:false) so they don't consume provider context budget.
- Fix error persistence bug: when max_tool_iterations is exceeded, the error
  reason and stop_reason are now synced into the in-memory assistant message
  transcript and event payloads, not just emitted as an event.
- New execute_parallel_batch() method for concurrent tool execution with
  abort signal checking between tools.
- drain_steering_messages() and drain_follow_up_messages() loop over all
  registered fetchers instead of checking a single source.

RPC hardening:
- Add MAX_RPC_PENDING_MESSAGES (128) and MAX_UI_PENDING_REQUESTS (64)
  queue bounds to prevent OOM from unbounded message accumulation.
- push_steering() and push_follow_up() now return Result<()> with
  queue-full error instead of silently growing.
- UI request channel uses drop-on-overflow when queue is full.
- Updated to use register_message_fetchers() API.

Interactive mode:
- Updated to use register_message_fetchers() API.
- Preserve scroll position when conversation content updates (maintain
  distance-from-bottom instead of snapping to end).
- Guard autocomplete replace range against stale indices when editor
  content has changed since the completion trigger.

Compaction:
- Track grep/find/ls tool calls as read-file operations in compaction
  summaries (was only tracking read/write/edit).

Autocomplete:
- Add MAX_FILE_CACHE_ENTRIES (5000) cap and truncate to prevent OOM
  in very large repositories.
- Refactor collect_project_files() to use map_or pattern.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1257,6 +1257,30 @@ fn max_tool_iterations_exceeded_returns_clean_stop() {
             message.error_message
         );
 
+        let persisted_assistant = agent_session
+            .agent
+            .messages()
+            .iter()
+            .rev()
+            .find_map(|entry| match entry {
+                Message::Assistant(assistant) => Some(assistant),
+                _ => None,
+            })
+            .expect("assistant message should be persisted");
+        assert_eq!(
+            persisted_assistant.stop_reason,
+            StopReason::Error,
+            "persisted assistant message should reflect max-iteration error"
+        );
+        assert!(
+            persisted_assistant
+                .error_message
+                .as_ref()
+                .is_some_and(|m| m.contains("Maximum tool iterations")),
+            "persisted assistant error should mention max iterations, got: {:?}",
+            persisted_assistant.error_message
+        );
+
         let guard = tl.lock().expect("lock");
         assert!(
             guard.tool_starts >= 2,
